MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert D. Cloessens for defedant and moving party: State of California, Department of Industrial Resolutions
Konstantinos A. Dimoyannis plaintiff and opposing party in propia persona

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion to compel further production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to produce responsive documents within 14 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Jun-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to quash medical records subpoena is granted in part. The subpoena is modified to require production of records from the date plaintiff commenced employment with the State of California, Department of Industrial Relations, to the present. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
